home.heroTitle: AI-powered image tools, all in one place
home.heroSubtitle: Upscale, remove backgrounds, resize, compress, and convert images in seconds.

pricing.heading: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subheading: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.
pricing.creditsIntro: Each tool costs credits based on processing type. Sharp tools are instant and cheap; AI tools use external models.
pricing.creditsSharp: Resize, compress, convert — {cost} credit each (Sharp, instant)
pricing.creditsAi: AI upscale & background removal — {cost} credits each

tool.uploadCta: Drop an image or click to upload
tool.processingKeepOpen: Processing your image — please don't close this page
tool.processingHint: This usually takes a few seconds. Keep this tab open until the result appears.
tool.processingAiNote: AI tools may take 10–30 seconds. We're checking automatically until it's ready.
tool.processingSlowHint: Still working — large images or AI models can take a bit longer. Please wait.
tool.readyToProcessHint: Upload an image, then click Process to start.
tool.resizeDimensionsHint: Enter at least width or height in pixels.
tool.upscaleQualityHint: Higher values increase resolution and processing time.
tool.validationFileRequired: Please upload an image before processing.
tool.validationResizeRequired: Enter a width or height before processing.
tool.validationResizeInvalid: Width and height must be positive numbers up to 10,000 px.
tool.validationGeneric: Please check your settings and try again.
tool.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
tool.errorUploadFailed: Upload failed. Please check the file size and format.
tool.errorProcessingTimeout: Processing took too long. Please try again.
tool.errorTooLarge: Image is too large. Please upload a file under your plan limit.
tool.errorInsufficientCredits: Not enough credits for this tool. Upgrade your plan or wait for your credits to reset.
tool.batchUploadCta: Drop images or click to upload multiple
tool.commercialLicenseBadge: Commercial usage license included with your Pro plan.

settings.apiKeysDescription: Create keys to process images programmatically. Keys are shown once — store them securely.
settings.apiKeyCreated: Copy this key now — it won't be shown again:
settings.commercialDescription: Your Pro plan includes rights to use processed images in commercial projects.
settings.economicsDescription: Margin if subscribers use their full credit quota. Max cost = all credits on AI (5 each). Realistic mix: 70% Sharp / 30% AI.
settings.economicsFootnote: Stripe ~2.9% + €0.25. Sharp = 1 credit (~€0). AI = 5 credits (~€0.02/job on Replicate). Post-AI WebP optimization runs on Sharp (€0).

legal.commercialIntro: Pro subscribers receive a non-exclusive license to use images processed through PixelForge in commercial projects, subject to the terms below.
legal.commercialBullet1: You may use outputs in ads, websites, products, and client work.
legal.commercialBullet2: You may not resell raw outputs as stock or compete directly with PixelForge.
legal.commercialBullet3: License applies per processed output while your Pro subscription is active.
legal.commercialDisclaimer: This summary is not legal advice. Contact us for enterprise or white-label terms.

dashboard.upgradeBody: Upgrade to Starter or Pro for HD downloads, higher quotas, and priority processing.
dashboard.noImagesYet: No images yet. Process a photo with any tool to see it here.
dashboard.maxUploadPerFile: Up to {mb} MB per uploaded file

auth.signupSuccessDescription: We've sent a confirmation link to {email}. Open it to activate your account, then sign in.
auth.signupSuccessHint: Didn't receive it? Check your spam folder or wait a few minutes.
auth.signupEmailAlreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists. Try signing in instead.
